'''Jem''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dalicron-4]].

==Biography==
Jem worked as a beverage maker and was based in the building [[Jem's]], in the settlement [[Dalia (township)|Dalia]]. He produced many different fruit-based liquids, including juice and liquor. He also employed the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] [[Vala]], as an assistant.
